variants.title: Mann Filter H 13 104 Hydraulics | Replaces the Hengst E58H
variants.option1Value: Mann Filter H 13 104 Hydraulics | Replaces the Hengst E58H
variants.description: MANN-FILTER hydraulic filter elements for high-pressure filters offer maximum filtration performance and ensure trouble-free operation of the hydraulic system. Thanks to the filter medium, which is specially adapted to the intended use, the finest impurities are separated from the hydraulic fluid.
specifications: Style: Hydraulics, Dimension A: 126.0 mm, Dimension B: 92.0 mm, Dimension C: 10.0 mm, Dimension H: 290.0 mm, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 126.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 92.0 mm, Length: 290.0 mm, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C

variants.title: Filtrec R731C10P Return Filter | Replaces the Hengst E58H
variants.option1Value: Filtrec R731C10P Return Filter | Replaces the Hengst E58H
variants.description: Genuine Filtrec R731C10P. This Filtrec element is designed to meet or exceed the quality and performance of brand OEM’s ensuring superior filtration performance and long-lasting durability. Engineered with their high performance media and a durable design, the R731C10P provides reliable and consistent performance over its lifespan, even in harsh operating environments. When you order from FilterFinder, you can trust that you are getting a reliable and high-quality replacement filter that will keep your system running smoothly.
specifications: Style: Return Filter, Media: Cellulose, Efficiency 1: 10µ @ β2, Outer Diameter: 126.0 mm, Inner Diameter: 92.0 mm, Length: 290.0 mm, Seal Material: Nitrile, Temperature Range: -30 - +100°C, Efficiency 1 The efficiency of the element is shown using the Micron (µ) and Beta (β) ratings. The micron rating indicates the size of the particle being filtered and the beta rating the efficiency , calculated as 1/β. E.g. a rating of β200 will be 99.5% efficient whereas β1000 would be 99.9%.: 10µ @ β2, Media Type: Cellulose, Flow Direction: IN-OUT, Seal: Nitrile

This filter meets or exceeds the equipment OEM quality and performance and is the first aftermarket replacement available on the market today, bringing your operation top-quality performance and an overall unbeatable total cost of ownership.
